name: GOLFTEC Upper Kirby
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf training facility that uses advanced motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide data-based instruction. Coaches work with golfers to build personalized improvement plans, helping players of all levels develop better mechanics and achieve on-course results. The centers feature indoor simulator bays equipped with GOLFTEC's proprietary OPTIMOTION system and offer services including golf lessons, club fitting, and practice memberships.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors provide detailed swing feedback unavailable on traditional ranges
Personalized improvement plans based on data-driven analysis help players achieve tangible results on the course
One-stop destination for both instruction and professional club fitting with major brands

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as a product and integrated component

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or rent equipment from GOLFTEC. The facility provides all necessary gear for lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted at GOLFTEC locations. The focus is on golf instruction and practice.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC does not offer traditional 18-hole simulator play. Sessions are structured around lessons, practice, and club fitting using their technology bays.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides instruction for juniors and youth players with age-appropriate programs and technology. However, it is primarily a training-focused facility rather than a family entertainment center.
